cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: TheNorthDowns
cards.quote: The North Downs stand as old sentinels over the road.

cards.name: Barrow-downs
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches over Nurn like a black horn of the earth, and no light lingers long beside it.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: CamethBrin
cards.quote: CamethBrin rises over the fields like a warning that never forgot how to speak.

cards.name: CarnDum
cards.quote: CarnDum stands hard against the North, and even its ruin looks carved for endurance.

cards.name: FennasDrunin
cards.quote: At FennasDrunin, the water is still enough to hide danger and patient enough to keep it.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: Fornost lies like a fallen crown upon the North.

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Under the hard sky of Forochel, even silence has a stern voice.

cards.name: Gundabad
cards.quote: Gundabad bears the deep memory of the North, grim as a mountain scar that never closed.

cards.name: Minas Morgul
cards.quote: Minas Morgul burns with a pale malice, and the road to it seems to remember fear.

cards.name: MtGram
cards.quote: MtGram stands with a dwarf-fast stubbornness, as though the hill itself had taken a vow.

cards.name: ErynVorn
